arts.ttl: Dusan Vlahovic’s Juventus career is OVER as Arsenal circle
arts.sum: Gazzetta dello Sport, Tuttosport and others all agree that Juventus will sell Vlahovic at the end of the season. Vlahovic’s contract in Turin expires in 2026 and Juve will do everything they can to sell the Serbian at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Inter Faces Injury Blow as Marcus Thuram Suffers Ankle Contusion Ahead of Juventus Clash
arts.sum: Inter Milan have been dealt a significant setback as star striker Marcus Thuram sustained an ankle injury during their Serie A match against Fiorentina at San Siro. The French forward was forced off in the 27th minute of the first half after suffering a painful contusion to his left ankle, leaving his availability for the upcoming Derby d’Italia against Juventus in doubt. The post Inter Faces Injury Blow as Marcus Thuram Suffers Ankle Contusion Ahead of Juventus Clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Andrea Cambiaso’s Recovery: When Will Juventus’ Key Full-Back Return?
arts.sum: Juventus full-back Andrea Cambiaso remains sidelined as he continues to recover from a persistent ankle injury that has kept him out of action for several weeks. With crucial fixtures on the horizon, including the Champions League playoff against PSV Eindhoven and the Derby d’Italia against Inter Milan, Juventus fans are eager to know when the 24-year-old will return to the pitch. The post Andrea Cambiaso’s Recovery: When Will Juventus’ Key Full-Back Return? appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus Makes History with Youngest Ever Squad in Champions League Knockouts
arts.sum: Juventus are set to make history as they field their youngest-ever starting lineup in a Champions League knockout match, with an average age of just 25 years and 171 days. As the Bianconeri face PSV Eindhoven in the first leg of their playoff round, this milestone reflects the club's bold reliance on youth under head coach Thiago Motta. The post Juventus Makes History with Youngest Ever Squad in Champions League Knockouts appeared first on FootItalia.com.
